title: Smallest Value After Replacing With Sum of Prime Factors
titleCn: 使用质因数之和替换后可以取到的最小值

testcases.input: n = 15 Output: 5 Explanation: Initially, n = 15. 15 = 3 * 5, so replace n with 3 + 5 = 8. 8 = 2 * 2 * 2, so replace n with 2 + 2 + 2 = 6. 6 = 2 * 3, so replace n with 2 + 3 = 5. 5 is the smallest value n will take on.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: Initially, n = 15. 15 = 3 * 5, so replace n with 3 + 5 = 8. 8 = 2 * 2 * 2, so replace n with 2 + 2 + 2 = 6. 6 = 2 * 3, so replace n with 2 + 3 = 5. 5 is the smallest value n will take on.

testcases.input: n = 3 Output: 3 Explanation: Initially, n = 3. 3 is the smallest value n will take on.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: Initially, n = 3. 3 is the smallest value n will take on.
